_description: Reference: OpenSearch + llms.txt extensions (W6.3). NOT page-blocks — renderer-hook extensions that auto-expose `/opensearch.xml` (browser-search registration) and `/llms.txt` (LLM-crawler-friendly site summary) on every published tenant site. The llms.txt extension supports 4 presets: minimal / blog-only / fastapi-style / mintlify.

llms_txt.title: Your Site Knowledge
llms_txt.summary: What this site covers + key links for LLM crawlers.

_llms_presets.minimal: Site title + summary + top-level URLs only
_llms_presets.blog-only: Adds every published blog post (title + URL + 1-line excerpt)
_llms_presets.fastapi-style: Adds every public API endpoint with curl examples
_llms_presets.mintlify: Adds every documentation page in a tree-walk format
